core/AdaptiveFilterEngine.h.note: GUI-thread adaptive RX passband coordinator over SliceModel/spectrum frames; canonical radio state, no vendor ties.

core/AgcTCalibrator.h.note: Engine algo sweeping slice AGC threshold vs audio RMS/S-meter to recommend a value; only canonical state.

core/AppSettings.h.note: Client-side XML settings store (SSDR.settings-style key/value persistence); app plumbing, not radio state.

core/AudioEngine.h.note: Client audio I/O + full RX/TX DSP chain (universal) fused with Flex VITA-49/DAX/Opus TX and Kiwi buffering
core/AudioEngine.h.split: Core: RX/TX volume/mute/pan, NR (NR2/RN2/NR4/DFNR/AFX), client EQ/Comp/Gate/DeEss/Tube/Pudu/Reverb/limiter chains, CW sidetone/keying, metering/scopes, device selection. Vendor 'flex': VITA-49 TX packetization (FLEX_OUI, PCC codes), DAX TX stream IDs/routes, Opus SmartLink TX, PanadapterStream feed. Vendor 'kiwi': feedKiwiSdrAudioData + per-source Kiwi buffers/gain/pan/delay.

core/AudioOutputRouter.h.note: Registry fanning the user-selected QAudioDevice to local playback sinks; OS device plumbing, no radio state

core/AutomationServer.h.note: QLocalServer GUI-automation/test bridge (dumpTree/grab/invoke on QWidgets); dev tooling, stays in gui shell

core/BandStackSettings.h.note: Per-radio band-stack memories (freq/mode/filter/AGC/NB-NR) — canonical radio state; only the XML store is client-side

core/CallsignInfo.h.note: Callsign lookup result struct (name/QTH/grid, JSON cache form); radio-agnostic spot/logging data.

core/CallsignLookupService.h.note: Orchestrates QRZ/cty.dat callsign lookups + cache; radio-agnostic spot/logging integration.

core/CatPort.h.note: CAT server (TCP+PTY, rigctld/TS-2000/FlexCAT dialects) for external apps; desktop integration, needs a home

core/ChannelStripPresets.h.note: Named-preset save/recall/import-export for the engine audio DSP chain; operates on core-profile DSP state.

core/ClientComp.h.note: Client-side TX dynamics DSP (compressor/limiter/drive/phase rotator + GR meters); radio-agnostic engine DSP.

core/ClientDeEss.h.note: Client TX DSP de-esser (sidechain bandpass + dynamics, meters); radio-agnostic engine DSP chain stage

core/ClientEq.h.note: Client-side parametric EQ DSP in AudioEngine (RX/TX paths); radio-agnostic engine DSP, no vendor protocol ties.

core/ClientFinalLimiter.h.note: Final-stage brickwall limiter in client TX DSP chain (ceiling/trim/DC-block + meters); radio-agnostic DSP.

core/ClientGate.h.note: Client TX-chain downward expander/noise gate DSP (thresh/ratio/hold + meters) — radio-agnostic engine DSP.

core/ClientPudu.h.note: Client-side TX audio exciter (PooDoo dual-band DSP) — engine TX DSP chain module, no radio-family coupling

core/ClientPuduMonitor.h.note: TX-audio monitor: record/replay post-DSP client TX chain output without keying; radio-agnostic DSP feature

core/ClientQuindarTone.h.note: Engine-side TX DSP stage: Quindar tone/Morse intro-outro on PTT; works over any radio's TX audio path.

core/ClientReverb.h.note: Client TX-chain Freeverb DSP (size/decay/damping/predelay/mix + meters); radio-agnostic engine DSP feature.

core/ClientTube.h.note: Client TX-chain tube saturator DSP (drive/tone/env follower); radio-agnostic engine DSP, no vendor ties.

core/ClientTxTestTone.h.note: 1 kHz TX test-tone generator injected at head of client TX DSP chain; radio-agnostic engine DSP feature

core/CommandParser.h.note: Stateless parser/builder for SmartSDR TCP wire lines (V/H/C/R/S/M, FlexLib semantics) — pure Flex protocol.

core/CwCallsignSpotter.h.note: Spots callsigns from the client-side CW decoder stream; radio-agnostic engine feature.

core/CwDecoder.h.note: Client-side CW/Morse decoder (ggmorse) over generic 24kHz PCM; radio-agnostic engine DSP feature.

core/CwSidetoneGenerator.h.note: Engine-side low-latency CW sidetone DSP driven by keying intent; radio-agnostic (DAX only in comment).

core/CwTrace.h.note: Header-only helpers minting monotonic ms timestamps + trace IDs for CW keying latency diagnostics, not radio state

core/CwxLocalKeyer.h.note: Local CW sidetone keyer: text+WPM in, key-down edges out; radio-agnostic despite Flex 'CWX' naming.

core/DaxTxPolicy.h.note: Policy deciding when to claim a Flex dax_tx stream vs deferring to SmartSDR DAX2; whole surface is DAX/VITA-49.

core/DeviceDiagnostics.h.note: Host audio-device diagnostics (Qt device BT/USB heuristics, JSON snapshots for troubleshooting), not radio state

core/DvkWavTransfer.h.note: DVK WAV upload/download via SmartSDR 'dvk' verbs + ad-hoc TCP port streaming; FlexLib 5MB limit baked in

core/DxClusterClient.h.note: Telnet DX cluster spot client (Spider/AR/CC); emits radio-agnostic DxSpot on canonical freq state.

core/DxccColorProvider.h.note: DXCC worked-status from ADIF log, colors cluster spots by call/freq/mode; radio-agnostic spot/logging feature

core/FirmwareStager.h.note: Downloads SmartSDR installers from flexradio.com, extracts .ssdr firmware for 6x00/9600 upload — pure Flex

core/FirmwareUploader.h.note: SmartSDR firmware upload: 'file upload' cmd, .ssdr files, Flex TCP ports 4995/42607 — pure Flex protocol

core/FlexControlManager.h.note: FlexControl USB knob serial driver (VID 0x2192); Flex ecosystem hardware but client-side input, home=gui shell

core/FreeDvClient.h.note: FreeDV Reporter spot client (qso.freedv.org); radio-agnostic spotting fed by canonical freq/TX + RADE SNR

core/GpuSelector.h.note: GPU enumeration + persisted QRhi render-adapter choice applied at app startup; pure client rendering plumbing

core/HidEncoderManager.h.note: USB HID control-surface driver (RC-28, StreamDeck+, TMate 2): desktop input device plumbing, not radio state

core/IConnectionAutomation.h.note: Gui-free connect/disconnect/dialog hook the automation bridge drives; bridge plumbing, not radio state.

core/IambicKeyer.h.note: Radio-agnostic software iambic state machine for local sidetone + CW paddle/keying intent; no vendor coupling.

core/KiwiPublicDirectory.h.note: Fetches/parses kiwisdr.com/public directory + per-sysop ext_api policy; KiwiSDR ecosystem discovery only.

core/KiwiSdrClient.h.note: KiwiSDR WebSocket protocol client (SND/WF streams, ADPCM, camp/monitor states) — the kiwi backend itself

core/KiwiSdrManager.h.note: KiwiSDR connection/profile manager: Kiwi protocol state, telemetry, waterfall/audio streams; vendor extension.

core/KiwiSdrProtocol.h.note: KiwiSDR websocket wire protocol: SND/W/F frame decode, ADPCM, MSG tokens, camp/auth, kiwi command formatting

core/LogManager.h.note: App-wide diagnostic logging: category registry, log file/retention, runtime toggles. Plumbing, not radio state.

core/MacMicPermission.h.note: macOS mic permission dialog at app startup; OS permission plumbing, no radio state — belongs in the client app

core/MaidenheadLocator.h.note: Header-only Maidenhead grid/lat-lon/distance/bearing math; stateless shared utility, not a protocol surface

core/MemoryCsvCompat.h.note: SmartSDR memory-CSV import/export codec (exact 22-col format); Flex ecosystem interchange, not core protocol.

core/MemoryFieldValues.h.note: Canonical memory-channel value lists + sanitizers; concepts universal, wire forms mirror FlexLib protocol
core/MemoryFieldValues.h.split: Memory-field vocab (modes, offset dirs, tone modes, CTCSS tones, tuning steps) is core-profile; wire-form casing, 0x7f-space encoding, and mode set mirrored from FlexLib Slice.cs/Memory.cs are flex extension

core/MemoryRecallPolicy.h.note: Memory-recall intent (offset/tone math) is core, but builders emit SmartSDR slice command strings (flex)
core/MemoryRecallPolicy.h.split: memoryRepeaterTxOffsetFreq (repeater offset semantics) is core-profile; buildMemoryRecall*Command emit literal SmartSDR "slice tune/set" wire strings — flex encoding

core/MidiControlManager.h.note: RtMidi input-device manager (ports, bindings, MIDI Learn) driving client setters; control-surface plumbing

core/MidiSettings.h.note: MIDI controller binding/profile persistence (XML files) — client input-device config, not radio state.

core/MqttAntennaAlias.h.note: MQTT topic parsing/queue for antenna-alias pushes from a broker; external integration plumbing, not radio state

core/MqttClient.h.note: Generic libmosquitto MQTT pub/sub wrapper for external integrations; no radio state, needs a home not a protocol msg

core/MqttSettings.h.note: Settings store for the MQTT broker bridge (conn config, topics, buttons, keychain); external integration plumbing

core/NetRecurrence.h.note: Pure RRULE math for net reminders; NetEntry is operator-scoped client state, so aligns with NetScheduler/NetEntry

core/NetScheduleStore.h.note: Local JSON persistence of NetEntry, which its header calls operator-scoped client state — not radio state

core/NetScheduler.h.note: Timer engine firing net-reminder alerts from NetEntry list; pure client calendar plumbing, no radio state.

core/NetworkPathResolver.h.note: Local NIC/IPv4 enumeration + interface-pick helper for connection setup; host networking plumbing, not radio state

core/NetworkSettings.h.note: AppSettings JSON wrapper persisting VITA-49 SO_RCVBUF tuning; settings storage, not radio state — engine config knob, no protocol msg

core/NvidiaAfxPack.h.note: Download/install manager for NVIDIA AFX BNR runtime pack (CUDA/TensorRT); deployment plumbing, no radio state

core/NvidiaBnrSettings.h.note: AppSettings-backed JSON store for Maxine BNR intensity + licence acceptance; persistence, not radio state

core/PanadapterStream.h.note: SmartSDR VITA-49 UDP receiver (FlexLib PCCs, DAX/IQ routing, SmartLink WAN reg); emits core-profile data

core/PerfTelemetry.h.note: Singleton perf-instrumentation logger for client render/UDP/input timing; diagnostics, not radio state.

core/PeripheralSettings.h.note: Client settings blob (AutoReconnect + legacy-key migration) for peripheral devices atop AppSettings; no radio state.

core/PgxlConnection.h.note: Direct TCP client (port 9008) for 4O3A Power Genius XL amp telemetry — Flex-ecosystem accessory protocol.

core/PipeWireAudioBridge.h.note: Linux virtual-audio bridge to WSJT-X etc.; audio routing is core, DAX channel model/rates are flex
core/PipeWireAudioBridge.h.split: Streaming demod RX / TX mic audio to host apps via OS virtual devices is core-profile (any backend can feed it, and the PipeWire/PulseAudio device plumbing is vendor-neutral engine-host code); the 4-channel DAX model, 24 kHz DAX rates, and "AetherSDR DAX 1-4" naming are Flex DAX extensions.

core/PotaClient.h.note: POTA spot poller (api.pota.app) emitting DxSpot frequency/mode spots; radio-agnostic spot feature, no vendor ties.

core/ProfileTransfer.h.note: SmartSDR .ssdr_cfg database import/export over Flex TCP transfer protocol (meta_subset, ports 4995/42607)

core/PropForecastClient.h.note: Web client fetching NOAA SWPC/hamqsl propagation data for dashboards; no radio state, external integration

core/PskReporterClient.h.note: pskreporter.info HTTP/MQTT fetcher for reception reports of our call; external service feed for a map dialog, no radio state

core/QrzLookupSettings.h.note: QRZ credential/settings holder (keychain-backed); client-side settings plumbing, not radio state.

core/QsoRecorder.h.note: QSO WAV recorder gated by MOX using canonical slice freq/mode + audio streams; no vendor protocol ties.

core/RADEEngine.h.note: Engine-side RADE/FreeDV digital-voice codec (PCM in/out, EOO, sync/SNR); DAX mentions are just audio plumbing

core/RadioConnection.h.note: SmartSDR TCP text-protocol connection (commands/replies/status) — Flex wire protocol, per calibration anchor

core/RadioDiscovery.h.note: Device-discovery list/events are core-profile; SmartSDR UDP:4992 parsing + Multi-Flex/license fields are flex
core/RadioDiscovery.h.split: Discovered-device list surface (name/model/serial/address/status, discovered/updated/lost events) is core-profile; SmartSDR UDP 4992 broadcast parsing, multi-Flex/GUI-client fields (guiClient*, mf_enable), maxLicensedVersion/turfRegion, and bind/re-bind churn tied to SmartSDR discovery are flex vendor extension.

core/ReceivePresentationSync.h.note: Cross-source RX latency sync (queues + GCC-PHAT); mechanism is core, but API hardcodes Flex/KiwiSdr pair
core/ReceivePresentationSync.h.split: Core-profile: presentation delay queue, per-surface delay/due-time model, sync settings/status, GCC-PHAT audio delay estimator — all generalize to N sources. Vendor: hardcoded Flex/KiwiSdr source and reference enums, Flex-vs-Kiwi offset polarity, and flex/kiwi audio-pair selection (kiwiProfileId, flexSliceId) — should become generic source IDs with flex/kiwi bindings.

core/RttyDecoder.h.note: Radio-agnostic RTTY (Baudot) DSP decoder over generic 24 kHz PCM; engine-side digital-mode decode feature.

core/SerialPortController.h.note: USB-serial DTR/RTS PTT + CTS/DSR/DCD key/paddle input; local hardware I/O device, emits intent only

core/SettingsHelpers.h.note: QSlider live/persist debounce wiring for AppSettings saves; pure Qt client plumbing, no radio state.

core/ShortcutManager.h.note: Keyboard shortcut registry: QShortcut bindings, persistence, conflict checks — client input plumbing, no radio state.

core/SignalClassifier.h.note: ONNX CNN voice/carrier classifier over spectrogram patches; radio-agnostic engine DSP/analysis feature

core/SmartLinkClient.h.note: SmartLink WAN client: FlexRadio Auth0 login + TLS to smartlink.flexradio.com, WAN radio list/hole-punch.

core/SpectrogramBuffer.h.note: Ring buffer of FFT frames per panadapter feeding CNN classifier patches; pure spectrum data, radio-agnostic.

core/SpotCollectorClient.h.note: UDP listener for DXLab SpotCollector desktop app; external integration feeding DxSpot, not radio state

core/SpotCommandPolicy.h.note: Settings-backed passive-spots toggle gating whether client emits spot-add cmds; pure AppSettings policy, no radio state

core/SpotModeResolver.h.note: Maps DX-cluster spot mode/comment/band-plan to canonical radio mode; pure spot-to-state logic, no vendor ties.

core/StreamStatus.h.note: SmartSDR stream-status parsing: client_handle ownership, DAX RX/TX orphan-stream firmware quirks — pure Flex wire logic

core/SupportBundle.h.note: Diagnostics bundle: archives logs/sysinfo and opens email client; client-side support tooling, not radio state

core/TciServer.h.note: TCI WebSocket server for WSJT-X et al: protocol surface is canonical radio state, but audio/IQ rides Flex DAX
core/TciServer.h.split: TCI gateway over canonical slice/mode/TX/meter/audio state = core-profile engine service; DAX stream ownership/auto-assign, DAX RX/IQ audio plumbing (ownsDaxChannel, m_tciDax*, onDaxAudioReady/onIqDataReady, rearmDaxForProfileLoad) = flex extension

core/TgxlConnection.h.note: Direct TCP client for 4O3A Tuner Genius XL port-9010 protocol (relay/autotune); Flex-ecosystem accessory.

core/ThemeManager.h.note: Qt token-based theming singleton (colors/fonts/QSS, theme files, editor hooks) — pure client GUI plumbing, no radio state.

core/TxKeyingMarker.h.note: QWidget property marker guarding TX-keying controls from the automation bridge; GUI-shell plumbing, no radio state.

core/UlanziDialBackend.h.note: Platform alias for Ulanzi Dial HID knob backend (evdev/hidapi); physical input device for client, not radio state

core/UpdateChecker.h.note: App self-update checker polling GitHub releases API; pure client plumbing, no radio state — belongs in gui shell.

core/VersionNumber.h.note: Semver parse/compare utility used by update checker and What's New dialog; app plumbing, not radio state.

core/VirtualAudioBridge.h.note: POSIX-shm virtual audio device bridge feeding digi-mode apps; routing is generic, semantics are Flex DAX
core/VirtualAudioBridge.h.split: Core: route RX/TX PCM to external apps via virtual audio devices, per-channel gain, RMS level signals (client-host plumbing). Flex: DAX channel model (4 RX + 1 TX), /aethersdr-dax-* shm names, 24 kHz FLEX-8600 native DAX rate, DAX TX stream wiring.

core/VoiceSignalDetector.h.note: Engine-side DSP: detects voice signals in FFT bins using band-plan segments; radio-agnostic spectrum analysis

core/WanConnection.h.note: SmartLink TLS transport speaking SmartSDR V/H/R/S/M protocol with wan validate handshake + TOFU cert pinning

core/WaveformInstaller.h.note: Uploads Docker waveform images via SmartSDR fw 4.2.18 'file upload' TCP protocol — Flex-only ecosystem.

core/WfmDemodulator.h.note: WFM demod around WfmDsp: demod/Doppler-offset intent is core; IQ source is DAX IQ + SmartSDR cmds (flex)
core/WfmDemodulator.h.split: WFM demod capability + freq-offset/volume intent = core-profile; DAX IQ capture device/channel, DaxIqModel wiring, SmartSDR commandReady = flex

core/WfmSettings.h.note: Client-side settings blob (AppSettings JSON) storing WFM audio output device id + legacy-key migration.

core/WsjtxClient.h.note: UDP listener for local WSJT-X app decodes/status; desktop-side integration feeding the universal spot surface

core/aprs/AprsBeacon.h.note: APRS position/status beacon composition; radio-agnostic packet operating feature.

core/aprs/AprsMessenger.h.note: APRS messaging (send/ack/retry) over canonical TX path; radio-agnostic.

core/aprs/AprsPacket.h.note: APRS/AX.25 packet parse+encode data types; radio-agnostic.

core/aprs/AprsSettings.h.note: APRS client settings holder (callsign/SSID/paths); client-side settings, not radio state.

core/pms/PmsMailbox.h.note: Packet personal-message-system mailbox store/logic; radio-agnostic operating feature.

core/tnc/AetherAx25LibmodemShim.h.note: AX.25 modem shim bridging the client AFSK/libmodem demod to the TNC; radio-agnostic DSP glue.

core/tnc/Ax25.h.note: AX.25 frame data types/constants; radio-agnostic protocol layer.

core/tnc/HeardList.h.note: Heard-station list for the packet monitor; radio-agnostic.

core/tnc/KissTncServer.h.note: KISS-over-TCP server exposing the TNC to external apps; external integration, needs a home (cf CatPort/TciServer).

core/tnc/TncTerminal.h.note: Packet terminal session model (command/monitor); radio-agnostic operating feature.

models/AntennaGeniusModel.h.note: 4O3A Antenna Genius switch client: UDP discovery + SmartSDR-like TCP protocol; Flex-ecosystem accessory

models/BandDefs.h.note: Static ARRL band plan table (edges, default freq/mode, GEN/WWV); canonical band-plan data, no vendor ties.

models/BandPlanManager.h.note: Band-plan overlay data (segments/spots/license classes, region merge) from JSON; radio-agnostic canon

models/BandSettings.h.note: Per-band save/restore of canonical state (freq/mode/filter/AGC/WNB/display range) — band memories, no vendor fields

models/CwxModel.h.note: CW keyer intent: WPM/delay/QSK, 12 macros, send/erase, sent-index progress. Generic despite Flex 'CWX' name.

models/DaxIqModel.h.note: Flex DAX IQ streams: dax_iq stream create/rate cmds, 4-ch DAX model, pipes to SDR apps — DAX is Flex-only

models/DvkModel.h.note: Voice keyer slots/commands are core-profile; status parsing + FlexLib SsdrErrors mapping are flex.
models/DvkModel.h.split: Core: voice-keyer slots/status + rec/preview/playback intent. Vendor: SmartSDR status parsing, SsdrErrors code mapping, reply correlation.

models/EqualizerModel.h.note: 8-band TX/RX audio EQ state (enable + band gains) — core capability; SmartSDR wire parsing/cmds move to flex adapter

models/FlexWaveformModel.h.note: FlexLib waveform/WFP container management: parses SmartSDR waveform status, emits Flex protocol commands

models/MemoryEntry.h.note: POD memory-channel record (freq/mode/offset/tone/squelch/filter/digital offsets) — canonical memories surface

models/MeterModel.h.note: Meter registry+values are core-profile; VITA-49 raw scaling, TGXL/PGXL amp routing, COMPPEAK quirks are Flex
models/MeterModel.h.split: Core: meter defs/values, S-meter, TX pwr/SWR, mic/ALC, telemetry. Flex: VITA-49 scaling, TGXL/PGXL handles, COMPPEAK slice quirks

models/NetEntry.h.note: Net scheduler entry: RRULE/timezone/reminder metadata, operator-scoped local JSON; radio state only via embedded MemoryEntry

models/PanadapterModel.h.note: Per-pan display state is core-profile; DAX IQ ch, client_handle, VITA stream IDs, SmartSDR kv parsing are flex.
models/PanadapterModel.h.split: Core: center/bandwidth, dBm range, antenna list, RF gain, WNB, fps/waterfall cadence. Flex ext: daxiqChannel, clientHandle, VITA-49 stream IDs, loopA/B, preamp string, applyPanStatus/applyWaterfallStatus kv parsing of SmartSDR status.

models/ProfileLoadCommand.h.note: Parses SmartSDR 'profile global/tx/mic load' wire command + recall-hold timing/suppression sentinels; Flex-only

models/RadioModel.h.note: Central radio aggregate: core slice/pan/TX/meter/memory state fused with Flex protocol, DAX, SmartLink, Multi-Flex
models/RadioModel.h.split: Core: slices/pans/meters/TX/memories/audio levels/CW keying/GPS/antennas/network quality. Flex: SmartLink WAN, Multi-Flex client handles, DAX/NetCW streams, PGXL amp, licenses, USB cables, waveforms, profiles, SmartSDR protocol plumbing.

models/RadioSession.h.note: Per-radio session aggregate: owns RadioModel + id/label; session concept is core-profile, no vendor surface

models/RadioStatusOwnership.h.note: SmartSDR status parsing helpers: Flex hex handles, client_handle ownership, remote_audio_rx, interlock gate

models/SliceModel.h.note: Slice state (freq/mode/filter/DSP) is core-profile; DAX, index_letter, SmartSDR status KVs are flex ext
models/SliceModel.h.split: Core: freq/mode/filter, RIT/XIT, AGC, squelch, NB/NR/ANF DSP, FM repeater, antennas, record/play. Flex: daxChannel, index_letter, panId handle, SmartSDR applyStatus KVs, speex NRS profile workaround, ESC/diversity, RTTY/DIG offsets as Flex slice params. External-receive (kiwi) audio-replacement shims are backend-adapter glue.

models/SpotModel.h.note: Panadapter spot store (callsign/freq/mode/lifetime/priority) on canonical state; kv ingest is trivially generic

models/TnfModel.h.note: Tracking notch filter state (freq/width/depth/permanent, global enable) — generic DSP notch surface; kv parse is transport detail

models/TransmitModel.h.note: TX state model: power/MOX/VOX/CW/filter are core-profile; ATU, DAX, APD, profiles, interlock are Flex.
models/TransmitModel.h.split: Core: RF/tune power, MOX/PTT+Quindar, VOX, mic level/proc, CW params, TX filter, monitor. Flex: ATU, DAX, APD samplers, TX/mic profiles, interlock ACC/RCA delays+polarity, SmartSDR status-kv parsing/commands.

models/TunerModel.h.note: 4o3a TGXL tuner state/commands via SmartSDR 'atu'/'tgxl' TCP verbs + direct port-9010 relay control

models/XvtrPolicy.h.note: XVTR policy: transverter list/freq translation is core; waterfall-tile offset + FLEX model power clamps are flex
models/XvtrPolicy.h.split: Core: Transverter struct, RF/IF frequency mapping intent. Flex: ModelCapabilities-based band-stack keys, waterfall tile offset matching, FLEX-64/6600 max-power dBm ranges.
